name: Chicken Livers
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup White wine - dry or sauterne
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken livers into bite-size pieces; toss in flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Fry bacon pieces in a large skillet until browned; remove from the skillet when done.
3. Add the flour-coated chicken livers and green onions to the bacon grease in the skillet; sauté until lightly browned.
4. Pour the chicken bouillon into the skillet and stir into the drippings.
5. Add all ingredients, including the browned bacon bits and remaining ingredients, into the Crock-POT.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 4 to 6 hours.
7. Serve over rice, toast, or buttered noodles. (To thicken gravy, see Hints on page 12). From Rival Crock-Pot cookbook, date unknown
